verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are God, And I am not, So take Your place, Above my life With everything, and all I am, I’m holding on, Onto Your plan

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: My life is not my own, So come and take control, Cause You alone are good

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are good, All the time, And Your love endures forever, You are good, All the time, You are good.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There’s no other name, No other name like Jesus There’s no other name, No other name like Jesus There’s no other name, No other name like Jesus There’s no other name, No other name like Jesus
